title: Consultation Lifecycle — Process Flow
content:
start([START: User creates consultation request
POST /api/v1/actions/id/consultations
Body: consulted_user_id, context, question])

s1[1. Create consultation
INSERT actions.action_consultations
id, action_id, requested_by,
consulted_user_id, context, question,
status='requested', created_at]

s2[2. Status = Requested
Consulted worker is notified]

s3[3. Consulted worker provides input
PUT /api/v1/actions/id/consultations/consultation_id
Body: response_text]

s4[4. Status → Responded
UPDATE actions.action_consultations
SET status='responded', response_text,
responded_at=now]

s5[5. Requestor acknowledges response
PUT /api/v1/actions/id/consultations/consultation_id/acknowledge
Body: disposition incorporated or not_incorporated,
acknowledgement_note
not_incorporated requires justification]

s6[6. Status → Acknowledged
UPDATE actions.action_consultations
SET status='acknowledged', disposition,
acknowledgement_note, acknowledged_at=now]

s7[7. Consultation closed
Status → Closed
UPDATE actions.action_consultations
SET status='closed', closed_at=now]

s8[8. Record ActionAuditEvent for each status change
event_type: consultation.created,
consultation.responded,
consultation.acknowledged,
consultation.closed]
